contents: My Father has been under Dr. Vakili's care for 20 years and every time I have met him, have been pleased by his care and attention to his patient being at his own office or the hospital. My family and I appreciate the personalize care that Dr. Vakili provides and hope to be using his office services for many more years to come.

I first became a patient of Dr. Vakili about two years ago. I was diagnosed with CVI (Chronic Venous insufficiency). I was already in the later stages with the possibility of open ulcers in the near future. Scary considering I've been mostly healthy my whole life. Doc took the time to guide me through the lengthy treatment every step of the way. He assured me that we caught the problem in time to stop any further damage. I have had 3 ablations on my legs which each procedure was a definite improvement. I also had a pelvic stent put in due to vein collapse. All procedures have been virtually painless and recovery is short and easy. My legs look and feel better than they have in years. My quality of life has improved dramatically. My father was a doctor and my mom a nurse so I'm familiar with the medical field as a whole. Dr. Vakili is the type of cardiologist every one deserves. He truly cares about my health and well being. It has been a long journey but made simple by the professional staff and care of Dr. Vakili. God Bless Heart Vein & Vascular

Dr Vakiliti is one of a very special breed of Doctor - he cares! He devotes time to you, his special patient. He answers your questions so you understand!! He provides you with information! We are sooo very pleased to have him as our DOCTOR - you will be too!! Sincerely. Oscar & Karen Molina (Happy Patients)

Dr Vakili is super sharp was the Dr that found my widow maker was 90% blocked -Got an stent and saved my life. You get to see Dr Vakili at your visits and not a nurse practitioner or other dr as he is a private practice and not beholden to a large group. Highly recommended!!!!!

Dr Vakili is an excellent Cardiologist . He takes time to listen , explain even clearly . I came to Doctor Vakili with serious high blood pressure and thank to his carefull attention and expertises . Nickol the office manager is always professional , kind and helpful . I always feel confident and well taken care of after every visit . Highly Recommend .

Dr Vakili had been my cardiologist for around 20 years. He is very knowledgeable about all he does, He did a heart cath on me, has done vein work on both legs and every appointment he thoroughly looks at all my records. I’m 78 years old and he has made me feel better every year. I highly recommend him to my family and friends and whoever needs a fantastic cardiologist.
Dr. Vakili, and the entire staff provide wonderful and holistic care. From listening to providing preventative care, Dr. Vakili is more than a specialist. Highly recommend.

Dr. Vakili : Heart Vein & Vascular Clinic Several of my friends have shared their experiences with Dr. Vakili to me. They were very satisfied with him. So at 82 years of age I decided to seek a cardiologist for base diagnosis for future use. He is very thorough and experienced. He does spend the time to explain the diagnosis, so you are able to understand any questions you may have. Excellent services to the community. Thank you Dr Vakili. Donald and Raymonde Toland Dr. Babaka, Vakili MD Heart Vein & Vascular.
Dr. Vakili is very thorough in evaluating my cardiac condition. All the tests performed and results are fully explained. Goals and recommendations are also fully explained. I "heartily " recommend.

Dr.Vakili has been my mom doctor for over 15 years...she n is 90 and has Been in excellent health under his care.He listen to his patients and performs all test necessary to keep his patients comfortable..I highly recommend Dr.Vakili as your cardiologist. His staff is polite always there to assist u with any question.If ur out of town they will assist u in getting ur medication out to ur location...Number 1 doctor
